featureName: BUG-031-009 Dockerized Go E2E runner interruption leak
title: Daemon-owned Go E2E runner survives host-process cleanup and races stack teardown

scopeSummary.title: Reap Dockerized E2E children before stack teardown
scopeSummary.notes: Extends BUG-031-004 cleanup across the Docker daemon ownership boundary; reaping fix committed 8c4a10bf, re-verified GREEN on a quiet host this session.

executionHistory.note: Created the complete owning packet after Drive-local, neighbor-order, full Drive package, and assistant-to-Drive runs left core healthy; source tracing identified the unowned Docker child lifetime.
